chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنْ آذَى الْمُسْلِمِينَ وَ احْتَقَرَهُمْ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 145 – The one who hurts the Muslims and despises them

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/381)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/381)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) قَالَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ قَدْ نَابَذَنِي مَنْ أَذَلَّ عَبْدِيَ الْمُؤْمِنَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Hisham Bin Salim, from Moalla Bin Khunays,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Rasool-Allahsaww said: ‘Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic Says: “He has opposed Meazwj, the one who humiliates Myazwj Momin servant”’.
en.sarwar: 6. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from ibn Mahbub from Hisham ibn Salim from Mu’alla ibn Khunays from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “The Messenger of Allah has said, ‘Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, has said, ‘To cause suffering to My believing servant is certainly a declaration of animosity against Me.’”
